description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical can with a matte black background and a prominent, neon green 'M' logo on the front, which is characteristic of Monster Energy drinks. The surface of the can is decorated with a condensation effect, giving it a cold, refreshing appearance. The back and sides of the can feature a large, bold white nutrition facts panel and supplement information, with playful and unconventional text. The can's top is metallic and slightly recessed, typical of beverage cans. The overall design is visually striking, with high contrast between the black, green, and white elements. The can is made primarily of aluminum, with a thin printed label and is likely filled with a carbonated beverage.
description: A tall, black aluminum can with a neon green 'M' logo and bold white nutrition facts, resembling a Monster Energy drink. The surface appears cold and glossy with condensation effects.
description_view_0: The front view shows the large, neon green 'M' logo on a black background with condensation droplets.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the start of the nutrition facts panel and more of the can's text details.
description_view_2: The back view is dominated by the white nutrition facts and supplement information, covering most of the can's surface.
description_view_3: This angled view shows both the edge of the nutrition facts panel and part of the green 'M' logo.
attribute_brand_logo: A large, neon green 'M' logo resembling claw marks is visible on the front of the can, centered and vertically oriented.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A large white nutrition facts and supplement information panel is visible on the back and side of the can, listing calories and other details.
